response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience as a senior full-stack software engineer but lacks the critical foundational skills required for this role. There is no evidence of experience in hardware-software co-design, SoC/IP modeling, or performance optimization for AI accelerators and deep learning workloads.
strengths: Over 15 years of technical experience, exceeding the baseline requirement of a Bachelor's degree plus 8 years.
Strong background in high-throughput microservices and system performance optimization at the web/application layer.
Demonstrated leadership and initiative, including founding a platform and organizing technical workshops.
concerns: No experience with SoC and IP modeling, which is a core responsibility for this role.
Lacks expertise in deep learning workload optimization, GPU architecture, or SIMD/MIMD architectures.
Technical stack is overwhelmingly focused on full-stack web development (Node.js, TypeScript) rather than low-level hardware/software co-design.
